qa_pairs.question: What type of supercomputer was Hélios, and when was it installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Hélios was a supercomputer equipped with general-purpose graphics processor nodes (GPGPU). It was installed in Laval University's computing centre in the spring of 2014.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current status of the Hélios supercomputer, and how can users still retrieve their data?
qa_pairs.answer: Hélios has been decommissioned. Although interactive access through SSH was blocked on October 26th, 2022, data can still be retrieved via Globus.
